data.title: North Carolina Bitcoin Reserve Bill Advances in Legislative Process
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the North Carolina Bitcoin Reserve Bill, HB 92, has been approved by the House Pensions and Retirement Committee. Before proceeding to a full vote, the bill must pass through three additional committees: Rules, Agenda, and House Operations.

data.title: New Scam Targets DeFi Users Through Abandoned Project Websites
data.description:
According to PANews, a new scam targeting DeFi users has emerged, where fraudsters take over the websites of abandoned projects to deceive former users into signing malicious 'fund-draining' transactions. Unlike traditional scams that actively target victims, this passive approach specifically aims at users who may still have bookmarks of old projects.

DeFiLlama's anonymous founder, 0xngmi, has issued a warning, stating that expired domains have been removed from their platform and browser extensions. However, users are advised to remain vigilant. As these project teams have disbanded, there is no one to promptly identify security vulnerabilities or replace malicious interfaces, leaving users with the responsibility to thoroughly verify each transaction they intend to sign.

A member of the Maker/Sky community highlighted that the official domain of the now-defunct Maker subDAO Sakura is currently available for sale at a nominal price. This situation underscores the importance of caution among DeFi users to prevent falling victim to such scams.

data.title: The U.S. SEC will hold the third crypto policy roundtable on April 25, focusing on crypto asset custody issues
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Eleanor Terrett, a crypto journalist, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced that it will hold the third crypto policy roundtable on April 25, focusing on the custody of crypto assets. The meeting will have two groups to discuss broker-dealers and wallet custody, and investment advisors and investment company custody.
Members of the broker-dealer group include Jason Allegrante of Fireblocks, Rachel Anderika of Anchorage, Terrence Dempsey of Fidelity, Mark Greenberg of Kraken, Veronica McGregor of Exodus, Brandon Russell of Etana Custody, and Tammy Weinrib of Copper.

data.title: DARK’s market value briefly exceeded 30 million US dollars, setting a new record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News shows that the market value of DARK has exceeded 30 million US dollars in a short period of time, and is now reported at 0.0252USDT, with a 24-hour increase of more than 60%. DARK is an experimental network based on a trusted execution environment (TEE) designed to support an infinitely scalable MCP world.

data.title: Will Solana Price Continue Downward Trend To $65 After This?
data.description:
Solana (SOL) price action has drawn attention following a technical breakdown within a right-angled ascending broadening wedge. According to a crypto analyst, the recent breach below a horizontal support line around the $125 mark suggest a shift in market sentiment.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/16/will-solana-price-continue-downward-trend-to-65-after-this/

data.title: In the past week, whales sold a total of 143,000 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ali_charts, the number of wallet addresses holding between 100 and 1,000 ETH decreased by about 143,000 ETH in the past week, from 9.4325 million on April 9 to 9.2894 million on April 14. During this period, the price of ETH also fell from about US$1,669 to US$1,623.

data.title: South Korea's Financial Services Commission: Considering Allowing Banks to Directly Custody Crypto Assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Financial Services Commission (FSC) of South Korea is studying the feasibility of allowing banks to directly provide crypto asset custody services, and is currently conducting internal discussions on the relevant system. If approved, this will mark an important step for South Korea in the integration of crypto asset regulation and traditional finance. The policy is believed to help improve the security and compliance of crypto asset custody while opening up new business directions for banks. (조세일보)

data.title: WTO warns Donald Trump’s tariffs will have ‘severe downside risks’ on global trade
data.description:
The World Trade Organization (WTO) has released a new forecast on the global outlook for trade, warning that the tariffs rolled out by the President Donald Trump administration have deteriorated global trade, and it warned that global trade volumes could shrink even further if suspended tariffs are reinstated. In its report, trade in goods is […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wto-warns-trump-tariffs-have-severe-risks/

data.title: PEPE Price To Bounce 796% To New All-Time Highs In 2025? Here’s What The Chart Says
data.description:
PEPE’s price action has been relatively quiet in the past few weeks. The meme coin has been quietly going through a continued wave of selloffs amidst the volatility in the wider crypto market. However, an interesting technical analysis shows that the chart structure of PEPEUSDT is pointing to a massive move to the upside, one that could send the token soaring by as much as 796% before the end of 2025. As the broader crypto market continues to move sideways, crypto analyst MasterAnanda identified a short-term higher low forming around support levels, which could act as the launchpad for a major PEPE price breakout
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/pepe/pepe-price-to-bounce-796/
